parameters.query: SELECT doc_type, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='completed') AS completed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='running') AS running, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='failed') AS failed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='pending') AS pending, MAX(CASE WHEN status='running' THEN month_start::text END) AS current_month, MAX(CASE WHEN status='failed' THEN error_message END) AS last_error FROM oms.sync_progress WHERE company_code = current_setting('app.company_code') GROUP BY doc_type ORDER BY doc_type
